Description:
Stylish Fully-Furnished Studio Apartment in Avondale – Modern Comfort, Ultimate Convenience

43x Studios are now available at 7 Layard St, Avondale!

**Furnishings Provided**

Experience the best of city fringe living in these well presented, nearly-new furnished studio apartments, thoughtfully designed for those who value both comfort and lifestyle.
Ideal for singles, students, or busy professionals, this contemporary space puts you in the heart of vibrant Avondale.

**Why You’ll Love Living Here:**

Bright, colourful interiors with quality furnishings throughout
Spacious open-plan living – light-filled and inviting
Fully equipped kitchen with premium appliances
Bedroom and lounge furniture included!
Easy-care bathroom with separate toilet
Secure building with individual floor access, extensive CCTV coverage & gated entry
Onsite carpark available for just $15 per week

**Exclusive Resident Amenities:**

Welcoming foyer for you and your guests
Onsite laundry facilities for your convenience - or go to one of the three local laundomats
Secure bicycle storage
Lift access and main stairwell

Perfectly positioned in a sought-after city-fringe location, this modern apartment complex is just 100 metres from the Avondale Train Station, making your daily commute effortless. Avondale Primary School sits just over the fence, and you’re within easy walking distance to local shops, cafés, healthcare facilities, public transport, and beautiful green parks – everything you need, right at your doorstep.

Move in costs:
2 weeks' rent in advance
Bond - 4 weeks rent

We have a range of studios to choose from - yellow or blue-themed interiors, across four levels – ground-floor units feature private courtyards, while upper levels offer elevated views. All are approx 50–57m².

On-site parking is also available for just $15 per week (conditions apply).

Book in for a viewing through our website:
https://www.barfoot.co.nz/branches/royal-heights?tab=ForRent

ATTENTION: PLEASE DO NOT COMPLETE AN APPLICATION FORM UNLESS YOU HAVE PHYSICALLY VIEWED THE PROPERTY WITH ONE OF OUR AGENTS. Please see below for booking details.

Luxury Encased In Beauty.
Explore, play and indulge. Make Auckland your playground and live your life above all others.
This vertical community will embrace world class resident's only facilities including; a heated 20 meters pool, sauna, steam room, spa, gym, media room, terrace lounge and BBQ area.
At your fingertips is a 24 Hour valet and concierge service for your comfort. A wide choice of service options will be available by contacting the Pacifica concierge desk.

2 bedroom, 1 bathroom.
Sophisticated and luxurious interior design.
89 sqm appox. floor area including 8 sqm approx. balcony.
South-East views of Skytowel and the city.
Air conditioning in the living room.
Designer kitchen with all Bosch appliances.
Double glazed windows and soundproofing to ensure a quiet enjoyment.
Great security system with 24 hour CCTV monitoring.
Open plan living room / kitchen.
One valet parking included.
Power, internet and water NOT included.

Take advantage of the Pacifica's unmatched location and lifestyle. This is your chance to live in a well-connected base all within reach of the natural beauty and unique experiences Auckland has to offer.
Wake each day to a sparkling cityscape or harbour view. Feel the city stir and bustle before you even leave your home. At the end of each day, venture home through Auckland's cultural and culinary centre. Seconds from Britomart and just minutes away from both Silo Park and the Viaduct precincts, residents of The Pacifica are set to enjoy a unique Auckland lifestyle.
Connect yourself to the best of music, theatre and the arts. Indulge in exceptional food and wine, or make the most of the great outdoors with immediate access to the not-so-far reaches this spectacular country has become famous for.
The promise of its lofty vertical lifestyle is certainly seeing The Pacifica raise the bar.
This location is hard to beat.

Short-Term Fully Furnished Beauty with Utilities Included – Available 10 March to 31 December

Available from 10 March through to 31 December, this beautifully presented three-bedroom, two-bathroom home with two additional office or study spaces offers a unique fixed term living opportunity in one of Titirangi’s most sought after locations.

This is a rare chance to secure a fully furnished home for just under nine months, making it the perfect solution for a professional working family seeking quality, comfort and convenience without the long term commitment.

The home features a spacious kitchen with generous bench space and excellent storage, flowing seamlessly into open plan dining and living areas that open onto a sunny entertainer’s deck with stunning bush views and a retractable awning for year round enjoyment.

There are three well proportioned bedrooms, all with built in wardrobes. In addition, the property offers two separate office or study spaces, providing flexibility for those working from home, requiring a second lounge or needing additional utility rooms. Two bedrooms enjoy access to a private deck, while the lower level bedroom opens to the patio. A bathroom on each level ensures practicality for family living.

The property is insulated and well appointed, with polished wooden floors and thoughtful heating solutions to ensure comfort throughout the seasons. Outside, the grounds are low maintenance with a generous backyard and manicured gardens, with lawns maintained by the owner’s contractor.

As part of this special arrangement, power, water and internet are included in the rent, providing a seamless and stress free living experience. With a single internal access garage, carport and ample off street parking, and located just minutes from Titirangi Village, local schools, shops, amenities and beautiful west coast beaches, this home presents an exceptional short term opportunity in a premium setting.

Cats are welcome and dogs are negotiable.

Move in costs:
1st weeks rent - $800.00
Bond x 4 weeks - $3,200.00
TOTAL MOVE IN - $4,000.00
